translationDisclaimer: An samar da wannan fassarar don sauƙaƙe muku. Idan akwai saɓani, sigar Turanci na wannan manufar ita ce za a bi.
privacyDataWeCollect: BicycleRepairStations.com ba ya buƙatar asusun mai amfani kuma ba ya tattara bayanan sirri kai tsaye. Ba a amfani da kukis na talla. Ana tattara abubuwan amfani da ayyuka ba tare da bayyana sunaye ba ta hanyar Vercel Analytics da Vercel Speed Insights, gami da abubuwan hulɗa na gaba ɗaya kamar ayyukan raba.
privacyLocation: Idan kun ba da izinin wuri, ana amfani da wuraren ku ne kawai don daidaita taswira da nemo tashoshi kusa. Ba a taɓa aika wurin ku zuwa sabobin mu ba — ana sarrafa shi gaba ɗaya a cikin burauzan ku kuma ana watsar da shi lokacin da kuka rufe manhaja.
privacyIpGeolocation: Lokacin da aka hana ko ba a samu wurin burauzar ba, manhaja tana amfani da adireshin IP ɗin ku don tantance kusancin wurin ku na yanki don daidaita taswira kusa da ku da ba da shawarar harshe da ma'aunin nisa. Ana sarrafa wannan bisa la'akari da buƙatun halal (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)). Ana sarrafa IP ɗin ta hanyar aikin gefen Vercel; wannan manhaja ba ta adanawa ko yin rijistar adiresoshin IP ba. Za ku iya canja zaɓuɓɓukan harshe da ma'auni a kowane lokaci a cikin menu na saiti.
privacyLocalStorage: Ana adana zaɓuɓɓukan saiti naku (ma'aunin nisa, jigon launi, harshe) a cikin ajiyar gida na burauzan ku don su kasance tsakanin ziyarori. Wannan bayanan ba ya barin na'urar ku.
privacySharing: Idan kun yi amfani da kayan aikin raba na manhaja, hanyoyin haɗi na iya haɗawa da siginar yaƙin nema (misali alamun tushe/matsakaici/yaƙin nema) don auna tushen zirga-zirga gabaɗaya. Duk wani abun ciki da kuka zaɓa don raba ana aika shi kai tsaye daga gare ku zuwa dandamali, manhaja, ko abokin ciniki na imel da aka zaɓa ƙarƙashin sharuɗɗan sirrin wannan sabis.
privacyThirdParty: Ana loda hotunan taswira daga sabobin CARTO, ESRI, Stadia Maps, da OpenStreetMap. Waɗannan masu ba da sabis na iya yin rijistar adireshin IP ɗin ku a matsayin wani ɓangare na aikin saba na al'ada. Ana samun bayanan tashoshi daga Overpass API. Binciken wuri yana amfani da sabis na Nominatim geocoding. Ana tattara abubuwan ganin shafi, ayyuka, da hulɗa ba tare da bayyana sunaye ba ta Vercel Analytics da Vercel Speed Insights. Lokacin da kuka zaɓi ayyukan raba, hanyoyin haɗi na iya buɗewa a cikin dandamali na ɓangare na uku (misali X, Facebook, masu ba da imel, ko manufofin raba na'ura). Don Allah duba manufar sirri da sharuɗɗan kowane mai ba da sabis don cikakkun bayanai.
privacyChildren: Ba a yi niyyar wannan sabis ga yara ƙasa da shekaru 13 ba. Ba mu sani ba muna tattara bayanai daga yara.
privacyContact: Za a iya aika tambayoyi game da wannan manufar zuwa adireshin da aka jera a BicycleRepairStations.com.
termsAcceptance: Ta hanyar amfani da BicycleRepairStations.com kun yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗa. Idan ba ku yarda ba, ku daina amfani da sabis.
termsService: Wannan manhaja tana taimaka muku nemo tashoshin gyaran keke na jama'a da aka zana a OpenStreetMap. Har ila yau, tana da kayan aikin raba na zaɓi don rarraba hanyoyin haɗi na manhaja ta hanyoyin sirri. Ana ba da sabis kyauta a matsayin kayan aiki mai sauƙi ga masu hawan keke.
termsAccuracy: Bayanan tashoshi sun fito daga OpenStreetMap, tsarin bayanan da al'umma ke gyarawa. Bayanai na iya zama mara cika, mara daidai, ko sun tsufa. Koyaushe ku tabbatar cewa tashar tana nan kuma tana aiki kafin ku dogara da ita don gyara. Ba mu karɓi alhakin tashoshin da suka ɓace, waɗanda aka yi musu alamar kuskure, ko waɗanda ba sa aiki ba.
termsSharing: Idan kun yi amfani da fasalolin raba, ku ne ke da alhakin abin da kuka buga da inda kuka buga shi. Kada ku yi amfani da sabis don spam, cin mutunci, ko abun ciki marar doka. Ku ne ke da alhakin bin sharuɗɗan kowane dandamali na ɓangare na uku da kuke raba zuwa gare shi.
termsWarranty: Ana ba da sabis "kamar yadda yake" ba tare da garanti na kowane iri ba, a sarari ko a ɓoye. Ba mu ba da garantin samuwa, daidaituwa, ko dacewa da kowane dalili na musamman.
termsLiability: Gwargwadon iyakar da doka ta yarda, BicycleRepairStations.com da masu gudanar da shi ba za su kasance masu alhaki ga kowane barnar da ta faru kai tsaye, a kaikaice, ta haɗari, ko ta sakamako wanda ya taso daga amfani ko rashin iya amfani da sabis ba.
termsThirdPartyTitle: Abun Ciki na Ɓangare na Uku
termsThirdParty: Taswira, bayanan tashoshi, sakamakon tantance wuri, da manufofin raba na zaɓi ana ba da su ta ɓangare na uku. Sharuɗɗan sabis ɗin su na aiki.
termsChanges: Za mu iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗa a kowane lokaci. Ci gaba da amfani da sabis bayan an buga canje-canje yana nufin karɓar sharuɗɗan da aka sabunta.
